name: Mff Capital Investments Limited
analysis: MFF has all Fibonacci EMAs in full bullish alignment. EMAs are compressed, suggesting a big move is building. Price making higher highs and higher lows — healthy uptrend structure. Price has pulled back and is testing the 21 EMA at A$4.9801. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Strong confluence zone at A$4.9788 where 4 levels cluster. Trade setup: entry A$4.9801, stop A$4.8114, target A$5.0300. Risk/reward is 0.30:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
